product_overview: LinguaCard converts user-provided content (images, PDFs, pasted text) into AI-assisted study materials and provides interactive practice modes (library sentence practice and flashcards) to help learners train vocabulary and sentence production in context.
core_goals: Turn user-provided text (images, PDFs, clipboard) into study items using AI extraction.
Allow users to practice and verify translations of sentences from built-in and user-created sets.
Provide a flashcard study mode for repeated recall with configurable study direction.
Give users a dashboard view of progress and quick access to study modes after signing in.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to create an account or sign in with email and password to access personal study data and AI extraction features.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Enter email and password -> Submit sign in form -> See dashboard at /
Navigate to /auth -> Enter email and password -> Submit sign up form -> See dashboard at /
Navigate to /auth -> Enter invalid email format -> Submit sign up form -> See validation error prompting correct email format

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Surface current study progress, active sets and quick entry points to practice modes (Library and Flashcards).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See study progress and available modes -> Choose Library mode -> Navigate to /library
Navigate to / -> See study progress and available modes -> Choose Flashcards -> Navigate to /flashcards

features.name: Library Practice
features.description: Practice translating sentences from built-in or user-created sentence sets with tolerant matching and keyboard-driven verification.
user_flows: Navigate to /library -> Select a set from Library -> See first sentence to translate -> Type translation in the input field -> Verify translation with Enter -> See next sentence and progress update
Navigate to /library -> Select a set from Library -> Attempt to submit an empty translation -> See validation prompt asking to enter a translation

features.name: AI OCR / Text Analysis
features.description: Extract vocabulary and sentence items from uploaded images, PDFs, or pasted text using Google Generative AI to create study material.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open Upload Modal -> Upload a file (image or PDF) -> View extracted results -> Add selected extracts to a new study set
Navigate to / -> Open Upload Modal -> Upload or paste text -> View extracted results -> Add selected extracts to an existing study set
Navigate to / -> Open Upload Modal -> Paste empty text -> Submit extraction -> See validation message requesting a file or text input

features.name: Flashcards
features.description: Study vocabulary and sentences in a flashcard session with selectable study direction and per-card review actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /flashcards -> Choose study direction -> Start a flashcard session -> See first card prompt -> Provide an answer or flip to reveal the answer -> Mark card as known or set for review -> Continue through session and see session summary

routes.description: User dashboard showing study progress and available modes
Authentication page for login and signup

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign in or sign up using email and password via Supabase
user_interactions: Click Sign In or Sign Up

features.name: AI OCR / Text Analysis
features.description: Extract vocabulary from images, PDFs, or pasted text using Google GenAI
user_interactions: Upload a file or paste text

features.name: Library Practice
features.description: Practice translating sentences from built-in sets
user_interactions: Type translation in the input field
